name: superpowers
description: Superpowers fork with planning, TDD, design review, Behavior Evaluation, and Behavior Coverage.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, behavior coverage, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use BDD Superpowers to guide agent work through brainstorming, behavior evaluation, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
